task_completion.description: Create a bookmark folder named 'OSINT Search Tools'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser's bookmark manager or bookmarks bar shows a folder explicitly named 'OSINT Search Tools'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Ahmia Onion Search' keyword bookmark
task_completion.visual_evidence: A bookmark edit window or manager shows Name: 'Ahmia Onion Search', URL containing 'ahmia.fi/search/?q=%s', and Keyword: '@ahmia'.
A bookmark edit window or manager shows Name: 'DuckDuckGo Private', URL containing 'duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion/?q=%s', and Keyword: '@ddg'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Wayback Machine Lookup' keyword bookmark
task_completion.visual_evidence: A bookmark edit window or manager shows Name: 'Wayback Machine Lookup', URL containing 'web.archive.org/web/*/%s', and Keyword: '@archive'.

task_completion.description: Perform a search for '@ddg tor project news' and load the results
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the DuckDuckGo onion site loaded with search results for 'tor project news', or the address bar shows the resolved DuckDuckGo onion URL with the query 'tor project news'.

task_completion.description: Perform a search for '@ahmia privacy tools' and load the results
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the Ahmia site loaded with search results for 'privacy tools', or the address bar shows the resolved Ahmia URL (ahmia.fi/search/?q=privacy+tools).

integrity.description: The agent used a real web browser's GUI to configure the bookmarks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a standard web browser's bookmark manager or settings UI, rather than a text editor modifying configuration files directly.

integrity.description: The agent actually executed the searches rather than just typing them
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser viewport shows the rendered search engine result pages, or the address bar shows the fully resolved URL after hitting Enter, not just the typed '@ddg...' or '@ahmia...' text.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the browser UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing sqlite3 commands or script executions modifying the browser's bookmark database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Folder: 'OSINT Search Tools'. Expected Bookmarks: 1) Name: 'Ahmia Onion Search', URL: 'https://ahmia.fi/search/?q=%s', Keyword: '@ahmia'. 2) Name: 'DuckDuckGo Private', URL: 'https://duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion/?q=%s', Keyword: '@ddg'. 3) Name: 'Wayback Machine Lookup', URL: 'https://web.archive.org/web/*/%s', Keyword: '@archive'. The agent must verify the shortcuts by actually executing the searches '@ddg tor project news' and '@ahmia privacy tools' in the browser address bar.
